answer.short_verbatim_excerpt: Most children start reception full-time in September after their fourth birthday.
structured_summary: A child who turns 4 in June will usually start reception in September of that year.
A parent or carer must apply for a primary school place one year before the child starts.
Applications normally open in September and close on 15 January.
The application goes through the local council, which also provides local school and admission-criteria information.
A parent or carer who believes the child is not ready should contact the school in September to discuss options.

capture.answer_transcription: short excerpt only; remaining content is a structured paraphrase

question: My child is turning 4, what do I need to do to get them ready for school?

source_cards.title: Apply for a primary school place
